value.name: 3M Scotch-Brite Scrub Sponge - All Purpose Cleaning Pad

tags.name: Fun crafts to do with your kids

metaData.Key Information:
• Rinses clean with special coating that repels stuck-on residue and resists unpleasant odours
• Cleans without scratching with abrasive dots on coating scrubs that messes without damaging surfaces
• Antibacterial foam prevents germ growth for a more hygienic clean
• Stain-resistant function allows it to remain visibly clean and dirt-free
• Great for clearing sticky messes like eggs, cheese or curry
• Suitable for cleaning ceramics, glass, plastic, non-stick and copper cookware

metaData.SAP Product Name: 3M SCOTCH-BRITE 9055 SPONGE CLOTH 2S 1S

metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Rinse thoroughly before and after each use and squeeze dry
2. Sanitise in the dishwasher or by boiling
• Important:
1. Do not microwave
2. Do not use on stainless steel appliances
3. Test first in an inconspicuous area and allow to dry to verify no surface damage
4. Not for aquarium use

• Do not use for any other purpose other than the product description.
